"over following sequences: \n   - ML_STAR.Samples96 (Controlling), Adjust for '1' times consumption\n'loopCounter1' used as loop counter variable",

"{\nloopCounter1 = 0;\nwhile (\n   (ML_STAR.Samples96.GetCurrentPosition() > 0)\n)\n{\nAlignSequences(hslTrue, ML_STAR.Samples96, 1);\nloopCounter1 = loopCounter1 + 1;",
